description: Historical AWS analysis CLI; not a current Cyntrisec product.
name: io.github.cyntrisec/cyntrisec

environmentVariables.description: AWS profile name to use for authentication
environmentVariables.name: AWS_PROFILE

environmentVariables.description: AWS region to use (defaults to profile/env settings)
environmentVariables.name: AWS_DEFAULT_REGION

environmentVariables.description: AWS access key ID (use AWS_PROFILE instead if possible)
environmentVariables.name: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID

environmentVariables.description: AWS secret access key (use AWS_PROFILE instead if possible)
environmentVariables.name: AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY

title: Cyntrisec CLI (Historical)
